approach: Evaluate ELYSIA against REFLEX using MCC to determine revival/archival. Prioritize risk mitigation by analyzing maintenance costs vs. potential improvements. Base decision on comparative performance and strategic alignment.
steps: Implement MCC framework to compare Weaviate ELYSIA and REFLEX capabilities
Conduct controlled experiments to measure ELYSIA's performance against REFLEX benchmarks
Analyze results to quantify maintenance costs vs. potential value retention
Assess risks of archival (loss of improvements) vs. revival (resource allocation)
Document findings and recommend decision with justification
Update orchestration tools to reflect archival/revival decision

files_to_modify.change: Implement MCC evaluation logic for ELYSIA vs REFLEX comparison
